nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: Grasshopper sparrow
nodes.summary: Grasshopper sparrow（Grasshopper sparrow，学名 Ammodramus savannarum），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括稀树草原，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Grasshopper sparrows are sometimes found in crop fields and they will readily colonize reclaimed grassland

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The 2022 State of the Birds reported a long-term, range-wide decline of 2.13% per year, and a more recent decline of 3.48% per year. The leading cause of population decline across its range is linked to habitat loss and management, particularly conversion of grasslands to intensive agriculture and encroachment of shrubs and trees
